description_long: This handcart features a robust wooden body with gently curved side panels and a deep, open cargo area suitable for transporting goods. The cart is supported by two large, spoked wooden wheels, each attached to the sides near the rear. The front and rear ends are open, allowing for easy loading and unloading, while the side panels rise higher to help contain items. The wood grain is visible, giving the cart a rustic, utilitarian appearance, and the edges are reinforced with dark metal bands for added durability. The interior is spacious and unobstructed, making it ideal for carrying bulky or loose materials in urban environments.
description: A sturdy wooden handcart with high side panels, two large spoked wheels, and open ends for easy loading. The cart has a rustic look with visible wood grain and metal reinforcements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden body, one large spoked wheel, and the high side panel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open cargo area, the inward curve of the side panels, and the absence of a front barrier.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, displaying the other wheel and side panel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the open back, the depth of the cargo area, and both wheels extending outward.
